channel.title: A portfolio with frontity
channel.description:
Hi All,
After having fun with frontity the last few months, I've decided to use this lockdown to build me an own simple portfolio. Despite struggling a bit on generating the List of CPTs for /portfolio/ I had lots of fun.
Not sure, if I am finished yet - but I wanted to writes a few notes/blog articles about I have created the site - mainly to have a bit of documentation for myself of all the stuff I have learned in the process.
If there's some interest I can publish my theme in the future
Here's the URL: https://www.dossis.ch/

item.title: A portfolio with frontity
item.dc:creator: phn
item.description:
thanks for the kind words

Read full topic

item.title: A portfolio with frontity
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @phn,

The site looks fantastic! I love its design.

Thank you for sharing your projects with us. Keep up the great work!

Read full topic

item.title: A portfolio with frontity
item.dc:creator: phn
item.description:
Hi All,

After having fun with frontity the last few months, I’ve decided to use this lockdown to build me an own simple portfolio. Despite struggling a bit on generating the List of CPTs for /portfolio/ I had lots of fun.

Not sure, if I am finished yet - but I wanted to writes a few notes/blog articles about I have created the site - mainly to have a bit of documentation for myself of all the stuff I have learned in the process.

If there’s some interest I can publish my theme in the future

Here’s the URL: https://www.dossis.ch/

Read full topic
